mapper.select: with roles_data as( select t1.write_year , t1.doc_no , t2.comp_id , t1.hr_id , t1.hr_nm , t2.orgn_role_type , t2.orgn_role_id , case when t2.orgn_role_type = 'safety' then safety.orgn_role_nm when t2.orgn_role_type = 'risk' then risk.orgn_role_nm else null end as orgn_role_nm , case when t2.orgn_role_type = 'safety' then safety.ord_seq when t2.orgn_role_type = 'risk' then risk.ord_seq else null end as orgn_role_ord_seq from esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user t1 left join esg.tb_safety_duties_doc t2 on t1.write_year = t2.write_year and t1.doc_type = t2.doc_type and t1.doc_no = t2.doc_no left join esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role safety on t2.orgn_role_type = 'safety' and t2.orgn_role_id = safety.orgn_role_id and t2.comp_id = safety.comp_id left join esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role risk on t2.orgn_role_type = 'risk' and t2.orgn_role_id = risk.orgn_role_id and t2.comp_id = risk.comp_id where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t2.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' ) select t2.write_year , t2.doc_no , t2.title as training_nm , t1.hr_id , t1.hr_nm , t1.jbrp_nm , t4.orgn_id , t4.orgn_nm , coalesce(t4.ord_seq, 999) as orgn_ord_seq , roles.orgn_role_type , roles.orgn_role_id , roles.orgn_role_nm , coalesce(roles.orgn_role_ord_seq,999) as orgn_role_ord_seq , (extract(EPOCH FROM (t2.training_end::time - t2.training_start::time)) / 60) :: integer as training_minutes , case when t1.signature is not null then 'Y' else 'N' end as education_status from esg.tb_approval_info t1 left join esg.tb_training_result_report t2 on substring(t1.target_id, 0, 5) = t2.write_year and substring(t1.target_id, 5, 5) = t2.doc_no left join esg.tb_hr_info t3 on t1.hr_id = t3.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info t4 on t3.orgn_id = t4.orgn_id left join roles_data roles on t1.hr_id = roles.hr_id and t1.target_id = roles.write_year || roles.doc_no where t1.target_type = 'TRR' and t1.target_id like #{writeYear}||'%' and t1.type = 'attendee' and t2.comp_id = #{compId} order by t1.hr_id asc, t2.doc_no asc
